collectionNotes: Imported additional DFW Islamic centers and musallahs from Ahmed Sheikh's shared Google Maps list; entries without websites or times are marked for research.
For masjids whose prayer widgets do not expose Jumu'ah in static page text, verify the rendered homepage with a browser screenshot before marking times unavailable.
American Imams Academy is a known case: Jumu'ah appears visually under Isha on the rendered homepage but is missed by static text extraction.

masjids.name: East Plano Islamic Center
masjids.notes: Public homepage exposed these Jumu'ah times without login.

masjids.name: Dallas Muslims Community Center
masjids.notes: Public homepage prayer-time section lists Jummah Khutbah at 1:45 PM.

masjids.name: Sachse Muslim Society
masjids.notes: Public homepage lists 1st, 2nd, and 3rd Jumuah times. The site shows 01:30, 02:20, and 03:15; stored here as PM based on Jumu'ah context.

masjids.name: American Imams Academy
masjids.notes: The rendered homepage prayer table shows Jumu'ah under Isha as 1:30 PM and 2:30 PM. Static text extraction did not expose this line, so it was verified from a full-page browser screenshot.

masjids.name: Islamic Center of Wylie
masjids.address: 3990 Lakeway Dr Suite #111, St Paul, TX 75098
masjids.notes: Public homepage lists Jumu'ah at 1:45 PM and Iqamah at 2:15 PM.

masjids.name: Sufaraa
masjids.notes: Imported from Ahmed Sheikh shared Google Maps list of Islamic Centers and Musallahs. Website and Jumu'ah times need research. Code: 026291; Celina Masjid. Only brothers, no wudu area
